name: SonyLIV
tagline: Prestige original series alongside Telugu theatrical acquisitions.
intro: SonyLIV, operated by Culver Max Entertainment, has built a reputation in India for prestige original series — shows like Rocket Boys and Scam 1992 have set the platform's tone — while also carrying a selective Telugu film and series catalogue. The Telugu slate on SonyLIV tends to be curated rather than exhaustive, focusing on mid-to-large theatrical premieres and a handful of originals produced in partnership with regional studios. Viewers specifically tracking Telugu content often use SonyLIV as a secondary platform alongside Aha or Prime Video. Our directory captures every Telugu film and series with a confirmed SonyLIV streaming window, sourced from official announcements and the platform's public listings. Each entry has a dedicated detail page with streaming date, content type, and whatever cast, genre, and runtime data our enrichment pipeline has indexed.
